sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁארה

Transliteration: she'ĕrâh

Phonetic: sheh-er-aw'

BDB Definition:

Sherah = "kinswoman"
  1. daughter of Ephraim and foundress of the Beth-horons and of a town called after her Uzzen-sherah

Origin: the same as H7608

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Feminine
